notes: Phase 1 (Naxxramas, The Obsidian Sanctum & The Eye of Eternity) Best in Slot from Wowhead's WotLK Classic guide (wowhead.com/wotlk/guide/classes/death-knight/frost/...-bis-gear-pve-phase-1) — used because Icy Veins has no Phase 1 table for this class. Sources kept as written by the guide (they mix boss drops, emblem purchases and crafted items; wording varies per guide author). Enchants and gems reused from the wotlk/p4 profile for this spec (same stat priorities; some gems are later-phase cuts — use the equivalent lower-tier cut in Phase 1).

gems.name: Relentless Earthsiege Diamond (+37 crit, +3% crit damage)
Etched Ametrine (+16 hit / +23 Str) if short on hit — otherwise more Bold Cardinal Ruby
Enchanted Tear (meta activator) — otherwise more Bold Cardinal Ruby
